user.description: Do you want to configure the Saver?

time_elapsed.name: Saver: Time elapsed
time_elapsed.description: Check if elapsed time since a stored variable exceeds or falls below a threshold

variable.name: Variable
variable.description: Name of the Saver variable containing a datetime value

above.name: Above (seconds)
above.description: True if elapsed time is greater than this value in seconds

below.name: Below (seconds)
below.description: True if elapsed time is less than this value in seconds

compare_value.name: Saver: Compare value
compare_value.description: Compare a stored variable against a value

variable.name: Variable
variable.description: Name of the Saver variable to compare

value.name: Value
value.description: Value to compare the variable against

compare_time.name: Saver: Compare time
compare_time.description: Compare a stored datetime variable against another time or the current time

variable.name: Variable
variable.description: Name of the Saver variable containing a datetime value

comparison.name: Comparison
comparison.description: Type of time comparison to perform

compare_to.name: Compare to
compare_to.description: Time or datetime to compare against (not needed for 'After current time')

compare_time.name: Saver: Variable time reached
compare_time.description: Fires when the time or datetime stored in a Saver variable is reached. Re-schedules automatically when the variable changes.

variable.name: Variable
variable.description: Name of the Saver variable containing a time (HH:MM[:SS]) or ISO datetime value

offset.name: Offset (seconds)
offset.description: Optional offset in seconds applied to the stored time. Negative values fire before, positive after.

delete.name: Delete entity
delete.description: Deletes a saved state for an entity.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: ID of entity to delete from Saver.

delete_regex.name: Delete entities by regex
delete_regex.description: Deletes a saved state for all entities that match provided regex.

entity_id_regex.name: Regex
entity_id_regex.description: Regex that should be used to delete entities from Saver.

name.name: Variable
name.description: Name of the variable to delete from Saver.

regex.name: Regex
regex.description: Regex that should be used to delete variables from Saver.

set_variable.name: Set variable
set_variable.description:
Sets a variable to a manual value, an entity state, or the current timestamp.
 Only one of "Value", "Entity" or "Use current time" can be used.

name.name: Variable
name.description: Name of the variable to be set.

value.name: Value
value.description:
A manual value to set.
Cannot be combined with "Entity" or "Use current time".

value_entity.name: Entity
value_entity.description:
An entity whose current state will be used as the value.
Cannot be combined with "Value" or "Use current time".

use_current_time.name: Use current time
use_current_time.description:
Sets the variable to the current date and time (ISO-8601 format).
Enables time comparisons across days (>24h).
Cannot be combined with "Value" or "Entity".

save_state.name: Save state
save_state.description: Saves the state and parameters of the entity.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: ID of the entity (entities) that should be saved.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: ID of the entity (entities) that should be restored.

delete_after_run.name: Delete after run
delete_after_run.description: Deletes the saved state after its restoration. Default: true [Optional]

transition.name: Transition
transition.description: Transition that should be used during state restoring (applicable only for light entities).
